---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or improvement for eval-quality
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of the problem. E.g. "I'm always having to write X by hand when I..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you want to happen. If this is a new module, describe its exported API.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions, workarounds, or existing modules you've tried.

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, or examples here.
